name: cloud-finops
description: Expert Cloud FinOps guidance covering AI cost management, GenAI capacity planning, AI-powered FinOps automation, cloud billing (AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI), Kubernetes/container FinOps, serverless FinOps, data platform FinOps (Kafka, OpenSearch, Redis/Valkey), multi-cloud normalization (FOCUS spec), commitment strategy, tagging governance, SaaS asset management, ITAM, and GreenOps. Includes 26 domain-specific reference files grounded in enterprise delivery experience. Built by OptimNow and Viktor Bezdek, licensed CC BY-SA 4.0.
